SAP Certified Associate | Back-End Developer – ABAP Cloud
AVAILABLE FOR OPPORTUNITIES HYDERABAD, INDIA
🛡️
U.S. CITIZEN — Legally authorized to work in both **India** and **USA** immediately without sponsorship (No visa sponsorship required).

* Summary of Capabilities

SAP Certified ABAP Cloud Developer with hands-on expertise building scalable enterprise applications. Specializing in SAP RESTful Application Programming (RAP), Core Data Services (CDS View Entities), OData Services v4, SAP Fiori, and SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). Focused on clean, decoupled back-end code and semantic database modeling.

CGPA 8.5 B.S. Computer Science

---
title: Why Work With Rishik?
role: SAP Certified ABAP Cloud Developer
status: Available Immediately
---

# WHY WORK WITH RISHIK?

I am not just looking for a job — I am looking for challenging problems worth solving.

As a SAP Certified ABAP Cloud Developer, I am passionate about building scalable solutions, understanding business processes, and transforming complex requirements into efficient systems.

What drives me is curiosity, continuous learning, and the satisfaction of solving real-world problems that create measurable impact.

## WHAT I BRING

  • ✓ Strong problem-solving mindset
  • ✓ Ability to quickly learn new technologies and domains
  • ✓ Enterprise application development experience using SAP RAP and SAP BTP
  • ✓ Passion for understanding both business and technical challenges
  • ✓ Analytical thinking and structured decision making
  • ✓ Focus on delivering practical, scalable solutions
  • ✓ Adaptability across different industries and technologies
  • ✓ Strong ownership and accountability
  • ✓ Continuous learner with a growth mindset
  • ✓ Ability to bridge the gap between business requirements and technical implementation

## AREAS OF INTEREST

I am actively open to opportunities in:

  • • SAP ABAP Development
  • • SAP RAP Development
  • • SAP BTP Development
  • • SAP Technical Consulting
  • • Business Analysis
  • • Data Analysis
  • • Product Analysis
  • • Technology Consulting
  • • Enterprise Application Development
  • • Cloud Technologies
  • • Digital Transformation Projects
  • • Any highly problem-solving and impact-driven role where analytical thinking, innovation, and continuous learning are valued.

## MY APPROACH

When faced with a problem, I don't stop at finding an answer. I focus on understanding:

  • * Why the problem exists
  • * What business value is affected
  • * What is the most scalable solution
  • * How the solution can be improved over time

This mindset allows me to think beyond code and contribute to larger business objectives.

## WHAT RECRUITERS CAN EXPECT

  • ✓ Learns fast
  • ✓ Takes initiative
  • ✓ Adapts quickly
  • ✓ Communicates effectively
  • ✓ Thinks analytically
  • ✓ Works collaboratively
  • ✓ Remains solution-focused under pressure
  • ✓ Continuously improves skills and knowledge

## CAREER VISION

My goal is to grow into a highly skilled Enterprise Solution Architect and Technology Leader capable of designing systems that solve meaningful business challenges at scale. I am excited by opportunities where I can contribute, learn, innovate, and create lasting impact.

---
title: Personal Operating Principles
purpose: Design Guidelines & Professional Values
last_updated: 2026-06-15
---

# PERSONAL OPERATING PRINCIPLES

"Operating principles are the source code of professional character and system delivery."

## 1. SOLVE PROBLEMS FIRST

A working, secure solution deployed today is infinitely more valuable than a hypothetical, perfect architecture next month. Avoid premature optimization. Deliver concrete, testable value at every checkpoint.

## 2. LEARN CONTINUOUSLY

Technology changes, but foundational patterns remain. Commit to continuous curiosity. Invested 1000+ learning hours in SAP learning paths, backend engineering, cloud topologies, and functional system design.

## 3. BUILD SCALABLE SYSTEMS

Write clean, modular, and maintainable ABAP code. Leverage modern frameworks like SAP RAP (RESTful Application Programming Model) and decoupled cloud architectures (SAP BTP) to ensure system reliability and resilience.

## 4. THINK LIKE AN OWNER

Take end-to-end accountability for outcomes. Never say "that is someone else's repository." Care deeply about performance, security, logging, user experience, and documentation integrity.

## 5. FOCUS ON BUSINESS VALUE

Code is a tool, not the goal. True success is measured by business metrics: reducing operational workloads, automating approvals, eliminating calculation errors, and improving transaction throughput.

## 6. STAY CURIOUS

Question constraints. Keep pushing the boundaries of what is possible. Combine enterprise rigor with startup agility to solve complex problems and design elegant products.

---
title: Enterprise Case Studies
focus: Technical Problem Solving & Architecture
author: Rishik Maduri
---

# ENTERPRISE CASE STUDIES

## CASE STUDY 1: SMART COLLEGE MANAGEMENT SYSTEM

• Problem: Inefficient manual course scheduling and student registration, leading to 40% administrative delays and database conflicts.

• Analysis: Legacy ERP systems lacked RESTful API integrations and fine-grained role authorization, creating security vulnerabilities and sync lags.

• Architecture: SAP BTP Cloud Foundry hosting SAP RAP backend, with Core Data Services (CDS View Entities) and OData v4 exposure to Fiori Elements front-end, secured with Data Control Language (DCL).

• Implementation: Built managed RAP scenarios with Determinations (auto-calculating credits) and Validations (preventing course over-enrollment).

• Impact: Reduced workflow blocking by 45% and guaranteed zero enrollment conflicts.

• Lessons Learned: Decoupled backend behavior definitions simplify cloud migration and upgrades.

## CASE STUDY 2: AUTOMATED LOAN ELIGIBILITY & SCREENING

• Problem: High processing times for loan applications due to manual credit score checks and multi-step verification.

• Analysis: Data silos in customer databases and credit scoring APIs required manual data transfer, leading to 5% manual entry errors.

• Architecture: S/4HANA backend utilizing RAP Managed scenarios with custom validation routines and external credit agency OData integrations.

• Implementation: Designed complex CDS views to aggregate customer profiles, implemented custom lock mechanisms, and wrote ABAP OO validation hooks.

• Impact: Automated eligibility screening, reduced processing time by 60%, and eliminated calculation errors.

• Lessons Learned: In-memory SAP HANA calculations optimize massive database scans.

# INNOVATION LAB: FUTURE PROJECTS

A view into Rishik's technical ideas and systems engineered beyond employment boundaries, indicating long-term ambition as a Solution Architect.

## 1. DAIRY-LIFT

• Concept: Dairy logistics automation and temperature telemetry tracking.

• Stack: SAP BTP IoT core connection, RAP back-end service APIs, and automated alerts routing to regional dispatchers using OData triggers.

• Goal: Monitor shelf-life integrity during transport and automate dispatch reassignment if temperature thresholds are breached.

## 2. AGRILIFT

• Concept: Agricultural supply-chain network for local farmers and vendors.

• Stack: Python-driven pricing analysis engines combined with a secure ABAP Cloud transactional schema.

• Goal: Provide real-time market value indicators and automate purchase agreements based on production quotas.

Audience Assessment: Why Rishik?

RECOMMENDATION REPORT: SAP SOLUTION TEAM FIT

Rishik Maduri presents a highly optimized profile for recruiters looking for SAP Consulting and Cloud Architecture talent. As an officially certified SAP Associate in ABAP Cloud with B.Tech CSE academic credentials and multiple hackathon victory logs, he bridges the gap between high-performance backends and real-world business objectives.

Technical Fit (ABAP Cloud, RAP, BTP) 96%
Business & Process Fit (ERP Logic) 92%
Communication & Stakeholder Management 94%
Learning Agility (1000+ Study Hours) 100%
Leadership & Initiative Potential 90%

Core Strengths Summary

  • ✓ Zero Sponsorship Needed: Immediate availability as a U.S. Citizen (dual India/US status).
  • ✓ SAP Certified Clean Core: Thorough knowledge of ABAP Cloud standards and RAP architectures.
  • ✓ Analytical Rigor: Hackathon winner with advanced resource optimization algorithms.
  • ✓ Growth Mindset: Fast adapter of modern cloud and developer toolstacks.
